pack_name: AI Travel Assistant MVP Curated Static Knowledge Pack
purpose: A small, static grounding dataset for an MVP AI travel assistant. Use this instead of full RAG for early demos and testing.

recommended_use: Inject the relevant destination profile into the model prompt when the user selects or is matched to a destination.
Use tags and match_notes to support destination recommendations.
Use day_modules and pacing_notes to generate realistic itinerary drafts.
Use verification_required fields to prevent hallucinations around dynamic facts.
usage_guidance.standard_guardrail: Exact prices, hours, availability, events, and bookings should be verified through live or official sources before the user acts.

destinations.summary: Kyoto is a strong match for travelers interested in Japanese culture, temples and shrines, traditional districts, food markets, cafés, gardens, and slower-paced walking itineraries.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Higashiyama
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Useful for culturally focused walking routes.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Gion
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for users who saved traditional or atmospheric content.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Arashiyama
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for nature and slow-paced itinerary modules.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Central Kyoto / Nishiki Market area
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Useful for food-focused users; verify current shop hours.

sample_day_modules.morning: Explore a traditional district and nearby temple area.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Browse a food market or café-focused area.
sample_day_modules.evening: Keep the evening relaxed with a walk in an atmospheric district.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Works well for users interested in food, culture, cafés, and slow-paced exploration.

sample_day_modules.morning: Visit a scenic nature district or garden area.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add a nearby cultural site or walking route.
sample_day_modules.evening: Leave flexible time for dinner or rest.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users who saved nature, gardens, and quiet cultural content.

destinations.pacing_notes: Kyoto itineraries should avoid cramming too many temples or districts into one day. Group by area and include walking/rest time.
booking_readiness: Book accommodation near preferred areas or transit hubs.
Reserve high-demand cultural experiences if applicable.
Verify current hours for markets, temples, cafés, and seasonal events.
source_notes: Kyoto City Official Guide: Kyoto tourism resources include areas, activities, history/religion, art/culture, food/drink, nature/outdoors.
Japan Guide: Kyoto has many temples, shrines, historically significant structures, and a fresh food market street in central Kyoto.

destinations.summary: Lisbon is a strong match for travelers interested in walkable-but-hilly city exploration, viewpoints, tiled streets, cafés, food halls, historic districts, waterfront areas, and relaxed cultural itineraries.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Alfama
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Useful for scenic walking routes.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Baixa / Chiado
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good central base for first-time visitors.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Bairro Alto
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for evening-oriented travelers; verify current venue details.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Cais do Sodré / Mercado da Ribeira area
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Useful for food-focused itinerary modules.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Belém
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Often works as a half-day module.

sample_day_modules.morning: Start with a historic neighborhood walk.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Visit a viewpoint and café area.
sample_day_modules.evening: Keep evening flexible for dinner in a lively neighborhood.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users who like scenic streets, cafés, viewpoints, and relaxed urban wandering.

sample_day_modules.morning: Explore central districts and café stops.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add a food hall or market-style experience.
sample_day_modules.evening: Walk near the waterfront or choose a relaxed dinner area.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for food-focused travelers who saved coastal or café-heavy content.

destinations.pacing_notes: Lisbon is hilly, so itineraries should avoid too much backtracking and should include breaks between walking-heavy blocks.
booking_readiness: Choose accommodation based on walking tolerance and transit access.
Book popular activities or day trips in advance if desired.
Verify restaurant hours and reservation needs.
source_notes: Visit Portugal lists Lisbon experiences such as Bairro Alto dining, National Tile Museum, Oceanarium, and Pastel de Belém.
Lisbon tourism guides describe Lisbon as hilly and known for miradouros/viewpoints, historic neighborhoods, and Mercado da Ribeira/Cais do Sodré.

destinations.summary: Banff is a strong match for travelers interested in mountain scenery, hiking, turquoise/glacial lakes, wildlife, outdoor adventure, and scenic nature-focused itineraries.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Banff townsite
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good starting point for first-time visitors.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Lake Louise area
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: High-demand area; logistics and access should be verified.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Bow Valley / scenic routes
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Weather and road conditions should be verified.

sample_day_modules.morning: Start with a scenic lake or viewpoint experience.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add a moderate walk or nature-focused activity.
sample_day_modules.evening: Return to town for rest and dinner.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users who saved mountains, lakes, and scenic outdoor content.

sample_day_modules.morning: Choose one main hike based on ability and conditions.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add a lighter viewpoint or town recovery time.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for adventure travelers, but should be matched to fitness level and conditions.

destinations.pacing_notes: Banff itineraries should account for weather, trail difficulty, transit/parking logistics, and rest after active days.
booking_readiness: Verify trail conditions and weather before hiking.
Plan shuttle/parking logistics for high-demand areas.
Book accommodation early during popular seasons.
source_notes: Parks Canada describes Banff as Canada's first national park with Rocky Mountain peaks, glacial lakes, wildlife, and a mountain town.
Parks Canada states visitors to Banff National Park must purchase a national park entry pass.

destinations.summary: Porto is a strong match for travelers interested in riverside scenery, historic streets, azulejo tiles, wine/port culture, food, bridges, and walkable city-break itineraries.
known_for_stable: Port wine lodges on the Gaia side

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Ribeira
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for scenic city walks.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Vila Nova de Gaia riverfront
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Useful for wine-focused travelers; verify tasting availability.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Baixa
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good base for city exploration.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Foz do Douro
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Useful for users who saved coastal content.

sample_day_modules.morning: Explore the historic center and tile/architecture highlights.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Walk toward the riverfront and bridge-view areas.
sample_day_modules.evening: Keep evening flexible near the river or central dining area.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users who like scenic streets, architecture, food, and romantic city breaks.

sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add a riverfront walk or wine-related experience.
sample_day_modules.evening: Return to Porto for a relaxed dinner.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users interested in wine, river scenery, and cultural experiences.

destinations.pacing_notes: Porto is best planned with walking-friendly clusters. Account for hills and avoid too many cross-city moves in one day.
booking_readiness: Verify availability for wine tastings or Douro experiences.
Choose accommodation based on hill tolerance and desired atmosphere.
Book day trips in advance if the itinerary includes the Douro Valley.
source_notes: Visit Portugal states Porto's historic center and the River Douro on the Gaia side, where Port Wine lodges are located, are classified as World Heritage.
Visit Porto highlights Porto attractions across culture, heritage, nature, food and wine, shopping, and more.

destinations.summary: Paris is a strong match for travelers interested in museums, monuments, cafés, shopping, neighborhoods, Seine walks/cruises, food, art, and highly aesthetic urban itineraries.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Le Marais
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for aesthetic/café-focused city wandering.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Saint-Germain-des-Prés / Latin Quarter
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for literary/café interests.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Montmartre
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for scenic and artistic content.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Louvre / central Paris
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for classic Paris itinerary modules.

areas_or_neighborhoods.name: Canal Saint-Martin
areas_or_neighborhoods.notes: Good for relaxed urban exploration.

sample_day_modules.morning: Start with one major museum or monument area.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add café time and a walk through a nearby neighborhood.
sample_day_modules.evening: Keep evening flexible for dinner or a Seine-side walk.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users who like museums, cafés, architecture, and aesthetic city walks.

sample_day_modules.morning: Explore a café and bookstore-friendly neighborhood.
sample_day_modules.afternoon: Add shopping, galleries, or a park/walk.
sample_day_modules.evening: Choose a relaxed dinner area nearby.
sample_day_modules.why_this_fits: Good for users who prefer slower, less checklist-driven Paris experiences.

destinations.pacing_notes: Paris itineraries should avoid too many cross-city movements in one day. Anchor each day around a district or nearby cluster.
booking_readiness: Book high-demand museums, monuments, or activities in advance when needed.
Choose accommodation by preferred neighborhood and transit access.
Verify current museum hours and ticket availability.
source_notes: Paris je t'aime official tourist office highlights Paris districts, museums and monuments, Seine cruises, shopping, restaurants, and visitor planning resources.
